pattern: A single linear scan checking that consecutive elements always alternate parity is sufficient.
hints: Two numbers have different parity when one is even and the other is odd. What condition expresses this for a pair?
Check each adjacent pair: if both share the same parity (both even or both odd), the array is not special.
Iterate i from 0 to n-2 and verify nums[i] % 2 != nums[i+1] % 2 for every pair.

edge_inputs.description: two elements with same parity (both odd)
special until last pair which fails
max length all alternating starting even
two evens in the middle disrupts the pattern

stress.description: random array of length up to 100 with values 1-100
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 100) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
